display_name: Trait associated non-method requirements have no marker
notes: Only TraitMethodDecl owns TraitWitnessMarker. Associated type/value/function requirements use their own type/let::/def:: surfaces without `.`, `+`, `*.`, or `*+`.
any Trait requires object/existential safety and associated requirement binding before callable existential use.
